title: Jeet Hamaari
subTitle: Thakur Vikram Singh is informed by a museum curator that an ancestral sword that was donated by his father has been stolen. The sword bores half of a hidden treasure map. The other half is on a sword still in Singh's possession, and he must guard it. He finds a thief, Avvtar Singh attempting to steal the sword, and stops him. Avvtar grabs Thakur's son, Mohan, and he escapes.
